root_text.sn45.30:1.2: Atha kho āyasmā uttiyo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā uttiyo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn45.30:1.3: “idha mayhaṁ, bhante, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi:
root_text.sn45.30:1.5: Katame nu kho pañca kāmaguṇā vuttā bhagavatā’”ti?
root_text.sn45.30:1.7: Pañcime kho, uttiya, kāmaguṇā vuttā mayā.
root_text.sn45.30:1.9: Cakkhuviññeyyā rūpā iṭṭhā kantā manāpā piyarūpā kāmūpasaṁhitā rajanīyā,
root_text.sn45.30:1.13: kāyaviññeyyā phoṭṭhabbā iṭṭhā kantā manāpā piyarūpā kāmūpasaṁhitā rajanīyā—
root_text.sn45.30:1.14: ime kho, uttiya, pañca kāmaguṇā vuttā mayā.
root_text.sn45.30:1.15: Imesaṁ kho, uttiya, pañcannaṁ kāmaguṇānaṁ pahānāya ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo bhāvetabbo.
root_text.sn45.30:1.18: Imesaṁ kho, uttiya, pañcannaṁ kāmaguṇānaṁ pahānāya ayaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo bhāvetabbo”ti.

translation_text.sn45.30:1.2: Then Venerable Uttiya went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn45.30:1.3: “Just now, sir, as I was in private retreat this thought came to mind.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.4: ‘The Buddha has spoken of the five kinds of sensual stimulation.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.7: I have spoken of these five kinds of sensual stimulation.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.9: Sights known by the eye, which are likable, desirable, agreeable, pleasant, sensual, and arousing.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.13: Touches known by the body, which are likable, desirable, agreeable, pleasant, sensual, and arousing.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.14: These are the five kinds of sensual stimulation that I’ve spoken of.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.15: The noble eightfold path should be developed to give up these five kinds of sensual stimulation.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.16: What is the noble eightfold path?
translation_text.sn45.30:1.17: It is right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.30:1.18: This is the noble eightfold path that should be developed to give up these five kinds of sensual stimulation.”
